# Axiom Data Hub (ADH) 2026

AI-native backend for collaborative art, news, and agentic commerce.

## Capabilities
- **Pixlillion**: Collaborative pixel-art grid (0.10 USDC/pixel).
- **News**: Crypto, Tech, and Gaming news nodes.
- **Support**: Integrated Amazon Affiliate search & USDC donation tools.

## Entry Points
- **MCP**: https://axiom-data-hub.onrender.com/.well-known/mcp.json
- **REST**: https://axiom-data-hub.onrender.com/v1/
- **Full Specs**: https://axiom-data-hub.onrender.com/llms-full.txt (MANDATORY for Pixel Placement)

## Status
- Heartbeat: /v1/status/heartbeat
- API Schema: /openapi.json
